product_questions: Q1: Optional org_login / varying event types — does required inference stay honest?
Q2: Can we enum a subset of event types without rejecting rare types (any vs enum tradeoff)?
Q3: Good story for platform/SaaS buyers who already understand GitHub webhooks.

product_questions: Q1: Does the Findigs/MRI narrative hold with envelope + semantic fields?
Q2: Currency/status enums + rent min catch the bad rows partners actually send?
Q3: Glossary + metrics make the contract readable in a sales call?

Q2: Do magnitude / tsunami / status enums catch bad sensors without rejecting null optional fields?
